speaker: speaker1
text: How long does it take to get to downtown from here ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What companies do we have in our neighborhood ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Mitsubishi , HP , IBM and many other famous corporations .

speaker: speaker1
text: Does the 7th floor belong to our company too ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , our company has two floors , the 6th and 7th floor in this building .

speaker: speaker1
text: It ’ s such a large firm . Do we have our own staff restaurant ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , at the end of the hall .
